# SCORE Small Business Services Overview

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, services-overview, mentoring, education, resources

## Resource purpose
Overview of SCORE’s free mentoring, practical business training, and resource library services.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use as a simple explanation page when a user asks what SCORE offers or whether SCORE is relevant to their business need.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Best audience
Anyone unfamiliar with SCORE or comparing SCORE to SBA/SBDC/local resources.

## Key resources or subresources
- Free business mentoring.
- Business education and practical training.
- Resource library with templates, tools, articles, and guides.

## BOSS routing notes
- SCORE is best framed as a free mentoring and education partner rather than a lender, grantmaker, attorney, CPA, or government certification authority.
- For BOSS routing, combine this overview with the specific stage or process file that fits the user’s need.

## Related SCORE links
- Find a mentor: https://www.score.org/mentors/
- Business education: https://www.score.org/business-education/
- Resources: https://www.score.org/resources/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
